Risk: Duplicate invoice submissions cause double payment
Mitigation: Server-side uniqueness constraint on (vendor invoice_number); duplicate-detection at upload

Risk: Incorrect approval moves invoice to payment
Mitigation: State machine validation; two-eyes approval for amounts above threshold; audit log
Reconciliation tests comparing report vs DB
Vendor-scoped queries; authorization middleware; integration tests for cross-tenant access

Risk: Role boundary violation (vendor performs AP action)
Mitigation: Role checks at API layer; RBAC tests in CI
Allowlist of mime types; content-type verification; malware scan
Short-lived tokens; invalidate on logout; idle timeout

Risk: Notification failures hide invoice status from vendors
Mitigation: Retry with backoff; failure logged for ops review

Risk: Payment processing failure on approved invoices
Incorrect status transitions corrupt invoice lifecycle
Mitigation: Explicit state machine; reject invalid transitions at DB and API

Risk: Network interruption causes orphan invoice rows
Mitigation: Transactional inserts; cleanup job for orphans
